STEP 1

Teach PicPlanr who is speaking

The AI uses this profile to shape its tone, content strategy and recommendations.

Automatic account understandingEnter your handles now. In the live product, connected social accounts will let PicPlanr study recent posts, captions, profile details and performance data automatically. This test creates a first-pass profile from the account information above.
STEP 2

Website analysis

PicPlanr turns the website into a clear business, audience, brand voice and content strategy report. The saved report can be revisited without using another website analysis.

No website report yet Complete account setup once and PicPlanr will save the full report here.
KEY PICPLANR FEATURE

Your business report will live here

PicPlanr will show the brand position, tone of voice, target markets, website strengths, conversion opportunities, content pillars and first content ideas on this page.

SUBSCRIPTION AND USAGE

Starter plan

Loading your current monthly usage…

CHOOSE THE RIGHT PLAN

Grow without unexpected limits

Every plan has clear monthly allowances. PicPlanr checks limits before paid artificial intelligence, storage or scheduling services are used.

Starter

For individuals, creators and small businesses.

£19 per month
  • 250 image analyses
  • 1 website analysis
  • 25 scheduled posts
  • 1 connected account
  • 1 team member
MOST POPULAR

Business

For active businesses managing regular content.

£49 per month
  • 750 image analyses
  • 5 website analyses
  • 100 scheduled posts
  • 4 connected accounts
  • 3 team members

Pro

For agencies, larger brands and content teams.

£99 per month
  • 2,000 image analyses
  • 15 website analyses
  • 300 scheduled posts
  • 10 connected accounts
  • 10 team members
Starter limits are firm. At 75% usage PicPlanr shows a warning, at 90% it recommends upgrading, and at 100% the server blocks the action before a paid service is used.
STEP 2

Connect social accounts

Clients sign in securely with the social platform. PicPlanr never receives or stores their password.

Not connected

Not connected

31

Google Calendar

Not connected

STEP 3

Improve the foundations

PicPlanr reviews the profile alongside the account information, then suggests clear visual, content and positioning improvements.

SOCIAL ACCOUNT REVIEW

Connected account preview

PicPlanr will only show a real Instagram or TikTok profile after the account has been securely connected. It will not create a profile from a typed handle.

Complete account setup, then run the review.
STEP 5

Upload images or videos

PicPlanr analyses images for post planning and can now carry approved videos into TikTok scheduling.

Temporary video storage Uploaded footage used for scheduling is kept for up to 40 days. Temporary exports are removed after 7 days. Captions, schedules, thumbnails and post history remain saved.
Drop a folder, images or videos hereImages: JPG, PNG or WebP · Videos: MP4 or MOV
Preparing…0 / 0
